---
title: "Jane Ley Yonge"
---

## Jane Ley Yonge

**Dates:** (1807/8-1881)

**Maiden name:** (Bennett)

### Description

known as \'Aunt Edmund\'

### Biography

She married (1835) Vice-Admiral Edmund Yonge, R.N. (1795-1868), younger brother of the Rev. John Yonge of Puslinch and cousin of CMY\'s father.

### Letters

- Letter from Novr 6 th [1869]

---

[← Back to all letters](../letters.html)
